event: serving as a policeman in a region of rural villages where domestic waste is traditionally burnt on open fires
crackles noted over the right lung
chest radiograph demonstrated infiltrates involving most of the right lung
treatment with intravenous (IV) cefuroxime was initiated
antibiotic treatment was changed to moxifloxacin
arterial blood gas disclosed PaO2 67 mmHg
a follow-up chest radiogram demonstrated progression to diffuse bilateral infiltrates
transferred to the intensive care unit
rapid decrease in eosinophil count after glucocorticoid administration
a chest radiogram revealed considerable regression of the bilateral infiltrates
